hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; rel="${f#$PWD/}"; case "$rel" in src/*.rs|tests/*.rs|Cargo.toml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; out=$(cargo fmt 2>&1 && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1 && cargo test 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
